prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-ICEPACK-D8133 Product Type: THERAPEUTIC_THERMAL_COMPRESS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Disposable Instant Ice Pack Emergency Breakable First Aid Kit Description: You never know when someone will get a sprained ankle, bump their head or get a sudden migraine. Whether you are traveling alone, with friends, or kids it always smart to be prepared for every eventuality.

Use the cold therapy ice bag for acute injuries, such as sprains, or strains. It can reduce swelling, reduce bleeding into the tissues, and reduce muscle spasm and pain.

This instant cold pack should be stored in the glove compartment of your car, truck, or in your motorcycle. Search Terms: Emergency Breakable First Aid Kit Content for Body Injuries Perfect Sports Camping Vacation Athletes Fitness Trainers Disposable Instant Cold Pack ice outdoors pain relief injury sprain strain Features: - SOLUTION FOR ANY INJURY – Simply squeeze to activate the “ice”. The flexible Instant Frozen Ice Pack is essential for small emergencies like sprains, bumps, and muscle spasms. - EXPERIENCE INSTANT PAIN RELIEF - The extra insulation keeps it cold and effective, to quickly reduce swelling and pain. - ESSENTIAL FOR ANY FIRST AID KIT – Whether you are an outdoorsman, sports coach or just a vigilant parent this 4.5 x7.5 inches ice therapy cold pack is an essential part of any first aid kit. - COMPACT, VERSATILE AND TRAVEL FRIENDLY – This one time use cold therapy can be used for muscle spasms, sprains, strains, headaches, bruises, and cramps. Take on the road, camping, hiking or to your sports game. - PORTABLE ICE PACK – No need to freeze in advance or take crushed ice along for the ride. Simply use the instant ice bag for cold therapy for all your injuries, accidents, aches, or pains. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Disposable Instant Ice Pack 4.5x7.5in

anthropic.title_differentiation: Squeeze Activation, Instant Cold Therapy, Portable First Aid, Pain Relief, Sprains And Strains, Travel Friendly

openai.title_differentiation: Squeeze To Activate, One Time Use, Reduces Swelling And Pain, Travel Friendly, For Sprains Strains And Bruises
